response.overview: If you need assistance with your account, +1-864.336.8850 transactions, or wallet-related issues, customer support is available through official support channels. Visit the help center +1-864.336.8850, start a live chat if available, or submit a support ticket with details about your issue. For faster assistance, have your account information and relevant transaction details ready. Always use the official support +1-864.336.8850 website to avoid scams and protect your account security. To recover your Zengo wallet, use the Recovery Kit and follow the steps to log in with your email and perform a 3D FaceLock scan. Recovery Steps Access Your Recovery Kit: Before you can recover your wallet, ensure you have your Recovery Kit ready. This kit is essential for restoring access to your wallet if you delete the app or switch devices. It includes a recovery file stored in your cloud service (Google Drive for Android or iCloud Drive for iPhone) and your 3D FaceLock authentication
